rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Build stage must reserve budget for writing code; exhaustive exploration before any file creation risks exhausting the USD budget with zero output.","scope":"kody pipeline"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When a task requires writing source files, write at least one file early in the build stage rather than deferring all file creation to the end.","scope":"kody pipeline"},{"kind":"decision","text":"ioredis dynamic import failure is expected; the decompose flow catches it and falls back to runPipeline() with MemoryCacheAdapter — this fallback mechanism works as designed.","scope":"src/utils/cache.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Cache layer follows existing patterns: adapter in src/cache/, middleware in src/middleware/, using MemoryCacheAdapter as in-memory fallback with redisAdapter.ts for production.","scope":"src/cache/"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Decompose sub-task failure (import ioredis) cleanly triggers cleanup and fallback, but on
